message:
fix(connectors): FCP error taxonomy and path sanitization for todoist, asana

- todoist/asana: Map RateLimited→FcpError::RateLimited,
  Unauthorized→FcpError::Unauthorized, NotFound→FcpError::ResourceNotFound
  instead of generic FcpError::External. Updates all affected tests.
- todoist: Add sanitize_path_segment() for task_id in complete_task/delete_task
  to prevent path traversal via user-supplied IDs.
- asana: Add sanitize_path_segment() for all GID parameters (workspace, project,
  task) across 9 client methods to prevent path traversal.
- linear: Already had correct FCP error taxonomy — no changes needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
